overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn/Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a stormy, overgrown post-apocalyptic ruin at night. The character moves from an exterior grassy area into a dimly lit abandoned building, transitioning from cool blue-green natural lighting to warm artificial interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown ruin exterior with stormy skies

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward the ruined concrete structure

entered.detail: large multi-story abandoned building covered in vines and vegetation
rusted yellow vehicle partially buried in grass
dense overgrown grass and ferns covering the ground
glowing teal vegetation scattered among the ruins

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through dense, overgrown grass toward a large ruined concrete structure under stormy night skies. The environment is dominated by cool blue-green lighting with bioluminescent plants visible near the building entrance.

events.description: character begins ascending weathered wooden stairs into the building structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs and approaching the building entrance

entered.detail: weathered wooden stairs with moss-covered steps leading upward
rusted metal railing along the stair edge
bioluminescent green cylindrical object emitting bright light
scattered rocks and debris at the base of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open grass field onto a wooden staircase leading into the ruin. A glowing green bioluminescent container sits near the stairs as Aloy ascends toward the building entrance, transitioning from open exterior to a more enclosed approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned building interior with makeshift survival camp

events.description: transition from cool stormy exterior to warm artificially lit interior spaces
discovering an abandoned camp with sleeping mats, supplies, and rope ladder

agents.ego_description: examining the interior rooms and abandoned camp supplies, moving through the derelict structure

entered.detail: cracked concrete flooring with patches of moss and dirt
thick concrete pillars supporting the ceiling structure
hanging rope ladder with wooden rungs suspended from above
large blue-green metal roll-up door with horizontal panels
woven mats and bedrolls arranged on the floor
wooden boxes and barrels containing supplies
tall stand with bright flame providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: Inside the abandoned structure, warm torchlight illuminates concrete pillars and scattered debris. Aloy explores the derelict interior, passing a rope ladder and discovering an abandoned camp with sleeping mats, supply crates, and a large metal shutter door. The environment shifts from the cool exterior tones to warm amber interior lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stormy, bioluminescent exterior into the warm, sheltered depths of a ruined concrete structure. It begins with Aloy walking through dense, overgrown grass under a cool blue-green night sky, moving steadily toward the looming silhouette of the ruin. As she approaches the entrance, the camera follows her onto a wooden staircase past a glowing green container, transitioning from the open field to a more enclosed architectural approach. The scene then shifts abruptly into the derelict interior, where the cool exterior tones give way to warm amber torchlight illuminating concrete pillars and scattered debris. Finally, the camera tracks her through the ruins past a rope ladder and into an abandoned camp filled with supply crates and sleeping mats before reaching a large metal shutter door.
